property.name: java.library.path

vm

testcase.name: wantedDetailShowsContactOnlyToLoggedInUsers

not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.kecheng.market.WantedApiIntegrationTest]: WantedApiIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-04-25T11:45:36.954+08:00 DEBUG 7128 --- [kecheng-market-backend] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Using ContextCustomizerFactory implementations
